graphEvents.label: kasper src/config.ts bounds min_observations_for_update as intField(1, 10)
kasper src/handlers.ts filters weaknesses below min_observations_for_update unless forced
kasper src/utils.ts findMatchingWeakness continues past below-min observation counts
kasper src/evaluate.ts returns before auto-update when no threshold-qualified weakness matches
deep_research_auto.yaml step_graph_convergence records graph decision only
deep_research_auto.yaml step_check_convergence turns inline+graph STOP into quality-guard-overridable decision
Place minIterations override after STOP candidate formation and before quality guards
Do not move minIterations into graph convergence scoring; consume graph decision in step_check_convergence
Emit explicit min-iteration override state so STOP blocked by age is distinct from quality failure
candidate exists but is not eligible until minimum evidence threshold is met
current YAML has a STOP override slot after decision formation
insert guard between composite STOP assignment and quality guard override
threshold is applied after aggregate lookup, before update side effects
graph step only produces decision/signal outputs
leave step_graph_convergence as snapshot producer and change consumer logic
minimum threshold is an explicit precondition, not hidden inside quality scoring
bounded config field supports stable guard reporting
add outputs/event fields for minIterations guard pass/fail

title: Place minIterations after STOP candidate formation, before quality guards
why: Kasper keeps a candidate but refuses to act before the minimum observation threshold; our analogous placement is after graph+inline convergence creates decision=STOP and before the quality guard override consumes it.

title: Keep step_graph_convergence pure and apply minIterations in step_check_convergence
why: The reference applies the threshold after aggregate matching and returns before mutation; our graph step is likewise only a decision snapshot producer, so the guard belongs in the consumer stop algorithm.

title: Record minIterations as a distinct stop override, not a quality failure
why: Kasper exposes threshold misses as their own no-op reason; deep research should output min_iterations_guard_pass/required/current so later reducers can tell age-gated CONTINUE from quality-gated CONTINUE.

text: The guard should be inserted in step_check_convergence, immediately after composite convergence assigns decision STOP and before the existing quality guard override. It should not change maxIterationsReached, and it should leave step_graph_convergence as a graph snapshot producer.
S4-02 covered minIterations as a config/backlog item; this iteration adds the exact YAML stop-order placement and audit shape.
